markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between HeyGen and GrowthX to align on content strategy, goals, and next steps for accelerating organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ambitious goal: 5x signups (from 400k to 2M monthly) by end of January](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - Focus on ranking \#1 for non-branded keywords HeyGen should own
  - [Rapid development of tools directory (15-20 pages) as key initiative](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2648.0)
  - [Leverage existing user research, sales data, and product capabilities for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2756.0)

## Topics

### Growth Goals and Metrics

  - [Current: \~1M monthly site visitors, \~400k monthly signups](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Target: 5x signups (2M monthly) by end of January](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Company ARR: $37M now, aiming for $70M-100M by end of January](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Sales-led ARR: $10M now, targeting $20M by end of January](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Key metric: 800k paid videos/month on prosumer plans (currently \~250k)](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Focus

  - [Build best-in-class tools directory to rank for non-branded keywords](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=3146.0)
  - [Prioritize high-volume, strategic keywords (e.g., video translation)](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=3279.0)
  - [Create landing pages for each tool, following successful competitor formats](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=3205.0)
  - [Develop editorial blog content to support directory pages](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=3302.0)
  - [Leverage existing newsletter audience (7-8M emails, 1M monthly active)](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

### Target Audience and Use Cases

  - [Horizontal product with diverse use cases (marketing, L\&D, religious orgs, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Key verticals: Customer education, courses, sermons, general marketing](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Focus on US/EU markets for higher conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [Roles: Video creators, marketers, content teams, localization specialists](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)

### Product and Content Gaps

  - [Need for better onboarding and "magic moment" within first 3 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Lack of up-to-date product demos and video content](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=3406.0)
  - [Outdated help center articles being refreshed and condensed](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=3436.0)

### Brand Voice and Tone

  - [Aspiring to be like Canva: simple, approachable, creator-focused](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
  - [Exploring unique brand voice using TV/movie character inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2115.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide accelerated timeline and action plan by tomorrow morning](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2543.0)
  - [Nav to grant GrowthX access to:](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2620.0)
      - [HeyGen product account](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2620.0)
      - [Air Ops account](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2620.0)
      - [Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2620.0)
      - [Google Ads account](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2620.0)
      - [CMS (via Okta)](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2620.0)
  - [Begin rapid development of tools directory (15-20 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2648.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze existing content, keyword data, and user research](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=2756.0)
  - [Schedule regular weekly check-ins and additional touch points as needed](https://fathom.video/share/xwvSEBka2ffpSBT6RxQ68gdMAUDq66c7?tab=summary&timestamp=3523.0)
